digest.greeting: Jean, the dashboard state shows a strong closeout on today's core checklist: Staff Aug, EPMO portfolio prep, support touchpoints, HR survey follow-up, Venn reply, and Lead Up planning are all marked complete. The main carry-forward is now narrower: organize Venn ticket numbers and open questions for the IT follow-up Danny flagged for tomorrow or Wednesday.

items.label: Closed the Staff Aug at-risk path check-in
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260615-confirm-staff-aug-at-risk-path complete after the morning digest tied it to the 9:30 AM TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint and the unread Asana report that flagged Staff Augmentation as at risk.

items.label: Prepared EPMO Portfolio Review routing decisions
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260615-prepare-epmo-portfolio-review complete after the morning digest identified classification, missing information, intake ownership, PM/PE assignment, and rejection communication as the review's decision path.

items.label: Used the Shelley and Licelot touchpoints for support/process follow-through
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260615-prepare-support-touchpoints complete. Outlook confirms today's Shelley 1:1 focused on department needs and Jean support, and the Licelot touchpoint focused on EPMO process and quality-assurance requirements.

items.label: Followed up with HR on survey results
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260612-follow-up-hr-survey-results complete after it appeared as an active one-shot reminder in the morning digest.

items.label: Replied on the Venn issues thread for Eugenia and Danny
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260612-reply-eugenia-danny-venn-issues complete. Outlook shows Jean replied today with team impact examples for Venn issues, including Mac-heavy disruption, unresolved tickets, OneDrive access loss, and VDI-style workarounds.

items.label: Planned Lead Up Module 2 pre-work
items.detail: Dashboard state marks task-20260612-complete-lead-up-module-2-prework complete after it carried over from Friday with a June 25 Rippling due date.

items.label: Collect Venn-related IT ticket numbers from TMs
items.detail: New dashboard reminder added today asks Jean to request IT ticket numbers from TMs related to Venn. Outlook also shows Danny replied on the Venn thread saying Nico and Danny will come back tomorrow or Wednesday with IT project updates and may need Jean's help organizing ticket numbers and outstanding issues or questions.

items.label: Use EPMO, not PMO, in process-overview materials
items.detail: Sara replied on the EPMO Process Overview & Org Chart thread that she will add the file to a shared drive and add edits, and that whenever the materials say PMO, they should say EPMO.

items.label: IT/EPMO Next Steps
items.detail: Outlook shows a 15-minute Danny Miller meeting about updates for partnering between teams. This may connect to Danny's same-day Venn reply about coming back with IT project updates.

items.label: 1:1 Conor B. & Jean G.
items.detail: Outlook agenda includes department needs, Jean's support, and project-management principles to improve project outcomes.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected midday space before the afternoon project-management block.

items.label: PM Workshop Pt.2
items.detail: Outlook says the next topic is controlling projects through stakeholders, with Mar, Yuri, and Jhara invited.

items.label: 1:1 Yuri & Jean, then 1:1 Jhara & Jean
items.detail: Yuri at 3:00 PM and Jhara at 3:30 PM create a tight portfolio and roadblock review block. Jhara's agenda explicitly includes portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps.

items.label: Scoping Call: RNWLS - Missing EAD Inquiry & SUPP - Post-submission Case Change
items.detail: Outlook shows a 30-minute scoping call with Jessica Richburg.

items.label: Scheduled reminder: COE playbook
items.detail: Dashboard state has a reminder scheduled for June 16: Seguimiento a David para la creacion del COE playbook.

items.label: Planner follow-up: report requirements with Frank
items.detail: Outlook has a Microsoft Planner notification from today: the task 'Check w/ Frank the report requirements' in the 11 Yuri Jean plan has a due date of June 16.
